What Makes Us Different

Built for Pakistan.
Not just translated.

Other platforms weren't built for Pakistani families, language, or payment methods. Every feature on Kor Da was designed with you in mind.

💰
PKR Pricing — No Surprises
Every listing priced in Rupees. Pay via EasyPaisa, JazzCash, or card. No USD conversion, no exchange rate shock.
vs other platforms
✗ USD pricing✓ Native PKR
🪪
CNIC-Verified Every Host
Every host verified via NADRA Verisys before going live. The green badge means their identity is confirmed in Pakistan's national database.
vs other platforms
✗ No Pakistan ID check✓ NADRA verified
💬
WhatsApp-Native Support
Questions? Issues? Reach us directly on WhatsApp in Urdu or English. Response under 2 hours. No email forms, no call centres.
vs other platforms
✗ Email only✓ WhatsApp <2hrs
🏥
Medical Stay Category
Families travelling for hospital treatment need 2–6 week stays near PIMS, Aga Khan, Shaukat Khanum. We built a dedicated category for exactly this.
🛡️
Escrow Payment Protection
Your money is held securely until 24hrs after check-in. File a dispute within that window for any issue — same-day resolution guaranteed.
🎓
University Admissions Stays
3–7 day stays near NUST, LUMS, COMSATS, and IBA during admissions season. A category no other platform offers for Pakistani families.

The Process
✦

Book Your Stay in 5 Simple Steps

Designed for everyone — whether you're booking your first stay or your tenth. Safe, clear, and completely in your control.

🔍1
Search & Filter
Search by city, dates, type, or your specific need — medical, university, or hills.
🏡2
Choose a Listing
View photos, host CNIC badge, all amenities, and honest dual-blind reviews.
💳3
Pay Securely
Pay PKR via EasyPaisa, JazzCash, or card. Money held in escrow until you check in.
🤝4
Confirm & Check In
Coordinate check-in details through our secure platform. 24hr window to raise issues.
⭐5
Stay & Review
Enjoy your stay. Leave an honest review — both sides submit before either sees. No pressure.
Safety First

Your trust is the product.

Every protection backed by real verification. Not just promises on paper.

🪪
NADRA Verisys — Live ID Check
Every host's CNIC verified against Pakistan's national database before listing goes live. Green badge = confirmed identity.
🔒
Escrow — Your Money is Protected
Payment held securely until 24hrs after check-in. File any issue within this window for a same-day resolution.
⚖️
Dispute Resolution — 24hr SLA
Every dispute reviewed by a real person. Both sides submit evidence. Written decision issued within 24 hours. No ghosting.
👁️
Dual-Blind Reviews
Neither guest nor host sees the other's review until both submit — or 48hrs pass. Honest ratings by design.
Host Protection

We protect hosts too.

Hosts are the backbone of Kor Da. OTP-verified guests, automatic payouts, and lowest commission in the market.

Start your Kor Da listing

Fill this form. Our team will WhatsApp you within 24 hours to complete CNIC verification and finalize your listing.

1
Your Details
Format: 00000-0000000-0 · Required for NADRA verification
2
Property Details
You keep 92% of every booking
3
Property Photos
Min 5 required

Good photos are the #1 factor in getting bookings. Upload clear, well-lit photos of: main bedroom, living area, kitchen, bathroom, and building exterior.

📸
Click or drag to upload property photos
JPG, PNG · Max 10MB each · Min 5, max 20 photos

Tips: Shoot in daylight · Turn all lights on · Show every room · Exterior is required

Host Agreement
  • ✓ I confirm this property is mine or I am an authorised manager
  • ✓ I agree to Kor Da's 8% commission policy and dispute resolution terms
  • ✓ My CNIC will be verified via NADRA before listing goes live
  • ✓ All listing information and photos are accurate

Our team will WhatsApp you within 24 hours at the number you provided.

✦
FAQ
✦

Frequently Asked Questions

You pay in PKR via EasyPaisa, JazzCash, or card. Your payment is held in a secure escrow account — not sent to the host until 24 hours after you check in. This gives you a window to report any serious issues. If no dispute is filed, funds release automatically. The host pays 8% commission only on completed bookings.
Every host is verified through NADRA Verisys before their listing goes live — a live database check against Pakistan's national ID system. Hosts with the green "CNIC Verified" badge have confirmed identity on record. We also manually review every listing before approving it.
File a dispute within 24 hours of check-in. Submit photos and a description. Our team reviews both sides and issues a decision within 24 hours. Since your payment is still in escrow, we can issue a full or partial refund depending on the situation.
Yes — you can message any host through our platform chat system. For security and your protection, our chat system detects and blocks sharing of personal phone numbers, external contact details, or requests to move conversations off-platform. This protects both you and the host from fraud and ensures all bookings stay protected by our escrow system.
Scroll up to the "Apply to Host" form, fill in your property details, upload at least 5 photos, and submit your CNIC. Our team reviews your application within 24 hours. Once approved, your listing goes live. There's no fee to list — we only take 8% when a booking completes.

🛡️ Platform Communication Rules

To protect your booking and payments, all communication must stay on this platform until booking is confirmed.

✗Sharing personal phone numbers or WhatsApp before booking confirmation
✗Sharing email addresses to move conversation off-platform
✗Asking guests to book through any other rental platform
✗Requesting payment outside of Kor Da's escrow system
✓After booking confirmation, contact details are securely shared
✓Violations are reviewed and may result in account suspension

These rules protect both guests and hosts. When you book through Kor Da, your payment is in escrow. If you go off-platform, you lose this protection.
